title: AN ACT CREATING A CERTAIN BARRIO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DIFFUN, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6083 / 58 OG No. 25, 4593 (June 18, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3393, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CREATING A CERTAIN BARRIO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DIFFUN, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Amanga, Campamiento, Veniado, Pe√±a, Dumanting Decal-la, and Makati, in the Municipality of Diffun, Province of Nueva Vizcaya, are constituted into a distinct and independent barrio, to be known as the barrio of Magsaysay.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
